languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

languages.text: "Я не понимаю, ничего не понимаю. Голоса... голоса враз взвыли и умолкли. Молчат. Пусто здесь, мертво..."
languages.translation_comment: characters accidentally ended up in the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."
languages.original_text: "Я не понимаю, ничего не понимаю. Голоса... голоса враз взвыли и умолкли. Молчат. Пусто здесь, мертво..."

traits.locale_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."
"I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."
"I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

languages.text: 「わからない、何もわからない。声…みんな叫んで、それから止まった。今は静かだ。ここは空っぽだ、死んでいる…」
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: 「わからない、何もわからない。声…みんな叫んで、それから止まった。今は静かだ。ここは空っぽだ、死んでいる…」

languages.text: « Je ne comprends pas. Je ne comprends rien. Les voix... Elles se sont mises à crier toutes ensemble avant de se taire d'un seul coup. Il n'y a plus que le silence, maintenant. Cet endroit est vide, mort... »
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne comprends pas. Je ne comprends rien. Les voix... Elles se sont mises à crier toutes ensemble avant de se taire d'un seul coup. Il n'y a plus que le silence, maintenant. Cet endroit est vide, mort... »

languages.text: "Ich verstehe das nicht. Nichts von all dem. Die Stimmen ... sie haben alle aufgeschrien und sind dann verstummt. Seitdem schweigen sie. Dieser Ort ist leer, tot ..."
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe das nicht. Nichts von all dem. Die Stimmen ... sie haben alle aufgeschrien und sind dann verstummt. Seitdem schweigen sie. Dieser Ort ist leer, tot ..."

languages.text: "Anlamıyorum, hiçbir şey anlamıyorum. Sesler... hepsi sadece çığlık atıp sonrasında durdu. Şimdi sessizler. Burası boş, ölü..."
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: "Anlamıyorum, hiçbir şey anlamıyorum. Sesler... hepsi sadece çığlık atıp sonrasında durdu. Şimdi sessizler. Burası boş, ölü..."

languages.text: «No lo entiendo. No entiendo nada. Las voces... han gritado todas y luego han enmudecido de repente. Ahora guardan silencio. Este sitio está vacío, muerto...».
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: «No lo entiendo. No entiendo nada. Las voces... han gritado todas y luego han enmudecido de repente. Ahora guardan silencio. Este sitio está vacío, muerto...».

languages.text: “我不明白，我什么都不明白。那些声音……它们刚刚齐声尖叫，随后又戛然而止。现在一片死寂。这地方空了，死了……”
languages.original_text: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."

traits.locale_text: “我不明白，我什么都不明白。那些声音……它们刚刚齐声尖叫，随后又戛然而止。现在一片死寂。这地方空了，死了……”
